curation_notes: Patch commit identified from PR #942 (Fix use-after-free in cms). Only 1 source file changed (openssl/src/cms.rs), not noisy. The vulnerability is in the CmsContentInfo::sign function where MemBioSlice::new(data)?.as_ptr() creates a temporary MemBioSlice that is immediately dropped, producing a dangling raw pointer passed to ffi::CMS_sign. The fix stores the MemBioSlice in a separate binding (data_bio) so it lives long enough for the pointer to remain valid. No sibling files contain the same MemBioSlice::new(...).as_ptr() pattern. Vulnerability class use-after-free confirmed from CWE-416 and the patch diff.
